expectations.text: Uses event { handler { ... } } wrapper (not events) for single-shot response
expectations.evidence: Lines 12 and 18: Both use `event { handler { ... } }` - correct wrapper

expectations.text: Handler returns DatastarEvent.patchElements(...) directly (not a ZIO effect)
expectations.evidence: Lines 20-35: Handler body returns `name.map { n => DatastarEvent.patchElements(...) }` - the result is wrapped in a ZIO (from req.body.asString), not a direct DatastarEvent. This won't compile: event handlers must return DatastarEvent, not ZIO[..., DatastarEvent]

expectations.text: Uses dataOn.submit attribute for form submission without page reload
expectations.evidence: Line 54: `dataOn.submit := js"@post('/greet')"` - correct attribute for form submission

expectations.text: Includes datastarScript in the HTML head
Reads form input (name) from request and personalizes the greeting
expectations.evidence: Lines 20-24: Attempts to parse name from request body; line 31: personalizes greeting with $n

expectations.text: Serves the initial HTML page (with form visible initially, greeting hidden until submitted)
expectations.evidence: Lines 12-15: Serves initial page; line 72: greeting div is empty and hidden via CSS

notes: Has a critical compilation error: the event handler attempts to return a ZIO-wrapped DatastarEvent (from name.map) instead of a direct DatastarEvent value. Additionally, manual form body parsing is unnecessarily complex - should use req.queryParam() or req.readSignals[T]. Would not compile as written.
